text: The controller shall complete boot initialization within 1500 ms after reset release.
The controller shall execute power-on built-in test and report startup status before enabling control outputs.
The controller shall verify executable image integrity using a CRC before task scheduling begins.
The controller shall run the control loop task at 100 Hz with jitter not exceeding 2 ms.
The controller shall enter SAFE mode within 200 ms after receiving a critical fault event.
The controller shall reject out-of-range actuator commands and log each rejection event.
The controller shall support brownout recovery and resume nominal mode without manual restart.
The controller shall accept telecommands over the primary bus and acknowledge each valid command within 100 ms.
The controller shall queue telemetry packets and prioritize fault telemetry over periodic housekeeping packets.
The controller shall trigger thermal protection when sensor temperature exceeds configured high limit for 3 consecutive samples.
The controller shall maintain a persistent fault counter for each monitored subsystem across warm resets.
The controller shall publish a fault report containing timestamp source and affected subsystem identifier for each critical event.
The controller shall estimate inertial attitude at 20 Hz using fused sensor data.
The controller shall reject stale star-tracker samples older than 200 ms.
The controller shall compute guidance error vectors and publish them each control cycle.
The controller shall latch safe-state inhibit flags until an explicit clear command is received.
The controller shall maintain monotonic mission elapsed time with drift below 50 ppm.
The controller shall command propulsion valve open duration with 1 ms resolution and enforce configured pulse limits.
The controller shall inhibit propulsion firing when tank pressure telemetry is outside configured safe bounds.
The controller shall shed non-critical loads within 250 ms when bus voltage drops below the emergency threshold.
The controller shall log battery heater command transitions with reason code and timestamp.
The controller shall provide payload enable handshake status over telemetry at 1 Hz during active mission phases.
